docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FAGAN, ERNISDEDELOISTINE AS TO DEFENDANT WAKSMAN, MIRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAGAN, ERNISDEDELOISTINE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE BETSY JOHNSEN. FILED BY FAGAN, ERNISDEDELOISTINE WAKSMAN, MIRA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE NOT STATED) SERVED SEP-29-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WAKSMAN, MIRA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PROGRESS REPORT OF 11/19/13. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-15-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. CASE WAS SETTLED THROUGH COURT MEDIATION. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
